ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: When the earth is shaken with its [final] earthquake
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: When the earth is shaken ˹in˺ its ultimate quaking,

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And the earth discharges its burdens
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: and when the earth throws out ˹all˺ its contents,

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And man says, "What is [wrong] with it?" -
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: and humanity cries, “What is wrong with it?”—

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: That Day, it will report its news
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: on that Day the earth will recount everything,

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Because your Lord has commanded it.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: having been inspired by your Lord ˹to do so˺.

ayahs.textArabic: يَوۡمَئِذٖ يَصۡدُرُ ٱلنَّاسُ أَشۡتَاتٗا لِّيُرَوۡاْ أَعۡمَٰلَهُمۡ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Yawmaithin yasduru alnnasu ashtatan liyuraw aAAmalahum
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: That Day, the people will depart separated [into categories] to be shown [the result of] their deeds.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: On that Day people will proceed in separate groups to be shown ˹the consequences of˺ their deeds.

ayahs.textArabic: فَمَن يَعۡمَلۡ مِثۡقَالَ ذَرَّةٍ خَيۡرٗا يَرَهُۥ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Faman yaAAmal mithqala tharratin khayran yarahu
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: So whoever does an atom's weight of good will see it,
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: So whoever does an atom’s weight of good will see it.

ayahs.textArabic: وَمَن يَعۡمَلۡ مِثۡقَالَ ذَرَّةٖ شَرّٗا يَرَهُۥ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Waman yaAAmal mithqala tharratin sharran yarahu
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And whoever does an atom's weight of evil will see it.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: And whoever does an atom’s weight of evil will see it.
